Felipe, thanks for making the time. I'm Sarah Whitmore, from Hartley and Vance. Before we get into the role, tell me a bit about yourself.
Of course. In my current role, I'm the CFO of a fintech. I oversee the finance team, and I report to the chief executive.
And how long have you been a CFO?
I've been a CFO for three years, and I've worked in corporate finance since 2014. Before that, I spent two years in private equity.
That's exactly the background our client is looking for. So what's driving the move for you?
I'm looking for an international role. I already deal with investors and the board every week. I want to do that in English, on a bigger stage.
In my current role, I oversee the finance team at a fintech.
Before that, I spent two years in private equity.
My background is in corporate finance and controlling.
I'm responsible for the budget, the forecast and investor reporting.

Hello Felipe, this is Sarah Whitmore from Hartley and Vance, an executive search firm in London. I am calling about the Chief Financial Officer position I mentioned in my message last week. Our client is a payments company with offices in London and Lisbon, and they are looking for a finance leader with a background in private equity and high growth technology. I have read your profile carefully, and your experience with budgets, forecasts and investor reporting is exactly what they need. The first conversation would be a thirty minute call in English with the chief executive. Please call me back this week and let me know if you are interested. I look forward to speaking with you soon.

Good morning, everyone, and thank you for joining our quarterly update. I want to start with the numbers. Our earnings grew by eighteen percent this quarter, and our gross margin is now the strongest it has been since we founded the company. Cash flow is healthy, and we are still comfortably inside the budget we approved in January. Our forecast for the next quarter is cautious but positive. We have not increased our headcount since March, and I want to keep the team lean while we grow. I also want to thank our finance team, who have worked very hard this year to give us numbers we can trust. Our stakeholders have noticed, and so have I. Let us keep this discipline going.
